scripts.format: oxfmt src test electron.vite.config.ts vitest.config.ts playwright.config.ts oxlint.config.ts oxfmt.config.ts package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check src test electron.vite.config.ts vitest.config.ts playwright.config.ts oxlint.config.ts oxfmt.config.ts package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json
scripts.test:electron: npm run build && playwright test -c playwright.config.ts
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:run
